settingsFields.label: No Default Styling
settingsFields.description: If checked, the default styles and classes of the container will not be applied.

settingsFields.label: Display
settingsFields.description: The display CSS property sets whether an element is treated as a block or inline element and the layout used for its children, such as flow layout, grid or flex.

settingsFields.label: Flex Direction
settingsFields.description: The flex-direction CSS property sets how flex items are placed in the flex container defining the main axis and the direction (normal or reversed).

settingsFields.label: Flex Wrap
settingsFields.description: The flex-wrap CSS property sets whether flex items are forced onto one line or can wrap onto multiple lines. If wrapping is allowed, it sets the direction that lines are stacked.

settingsFields.label: Gap
settingsFields.description: Examples of a valid gap include: `10` | `10px` | `20px 20px`

settingsFields.label: Grid Columns Count
settingsFields.description: Number of columns each grid should have

settingsFields.label: Align Items
settingsFields.description: The CSS align-items property sets the align-self value on all direct children as a group. In Flexbox, it controls the alignment of items on the Cross Axis. In Grid Layout, it controls the alignment of items on the Block Axis within their grid area.

settingsFields.label: Align Self
settingsFields.description: The align-self CSS property overrides a grid or flex item's align-items value. In Grid, it aligns the item inside the grid area. In Flexbox, it aligns the item on the cross axis.

settingsFields.label: Justify Content
settingsFields.description: The CSS justify-content property defines how the browser distributes space between and around content items along the main-axis of a flex container, and the inline axis of a grid container.

settingsFields.label: Justify Self
settingsFields.description: The CSS justify-self property sets the way a box is justified inside its alignment container along the appropriate axis.

settingsFields.label: Text Justify
settingsFields.description: The text-justify CSS property sets what type of justification should be applied to text when text-align: justify; is set on an element.

settingsFields.label: Justify Items
settingsFields.description: The CSS justify-items property defines the default justify-self for all items of the box, giving them all a default way of justifying each box along the appropriate axis.

settingsFields.label: Overflow
settingsFields.description: The CSS justify-items property defines the default justify-self for all items of the box, giving them all a default way of justifying each box along the appropriate axis.

settingsFields.label: Shadow Style
settingsFields.description: Determines visibility and position of the box shadow.

settingsFields.label: Border Width
settingsFields.description: Container border width (can px)

settingsFields.label: Background Image URL
settingsFields.description: Add a background image URL

settingsFields.label: Min Width
settingsFields.description: Container minimum width (can be %, px, or vw)

settingsFields.label: Max Width
settingsFields.description: Container maximum width (can be %, px, or vw)

settingsFields.label: Min Height
settingsFields.description: Container minimum height (can be %, px, or vw)

settingsFields.label: Max Height
settingsFields.description: Container maximum height (can be %, px, or vw)

settingsFields.label: Custom CSS Class
settingsFields.description: Custom CSS Class to add to this component

settingsFields.label: Wrapper Style
settingsFields.description: The style that will be applied to the container wrapper
